app_info.subtitle: HVDC evidence answers for Claude
app_info.description: HVDC Ontology Answer provides Claude users with corpus-grounded answers to HVDC project logistics questions. Responses include route documents, evidence snippets, validation findings, and next actions — all rendered as structured markdown.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes an ontology-grounded answer and writes a private audit hash log, so it is not strictly read-only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change public internet state or external third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible operational actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a short-lived upload token and writes a private audit hash log.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to configured Cloudflare R2/D1 project storage after OAuth scope and Human-gate approval.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or overwrite existing objects.

justifications.read_only_justification: Confirms uploaded file state and writes a private audit hash log.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads the configured Cloudflare R2/D1 project storage only.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or revoke access.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates an attachment record and writes a private audit hash log.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to configured Cloudflare D1 project metadata after OAuth scope and Human-gate approval.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or overwrite uploaded objects.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a proposed write artifact and private audit hash log.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to configured Cloudflare R2/D1 project storage after OAuth scope and Human-gate approval.
justifications.destructive_justification: Dry-run does not overwrite committed content.

justifications.read_only_justification: Commits a prior dry-run write proposal and writes a private audit hash log.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to configured Cloudflare R2/D1 project storage after OAuth scope and Human-gate approval.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete content and only commits a previously created proposal.

justifications.read_only_justification: Renders the prepared HVDC answer as a markdown card without changing data. Accepts both ChatGPT-format and Claude-format GroundedAnswer inputs.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not contact or modify any public or third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Classifies a question into ontology domains and required documents without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not contact or modify any public or third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches local approved ontology corpus files and returns matching evidence snippets.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not perform public web search or change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Parses identifiers from user text and returns local resolution candidates without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not contact or modify any public or third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Reads a projected HVDC WH Status Case No. from Cloudflare D1 and returns the case status report without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not contact public or third-party systems; uses the app-owned D1 projection.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, approve, send, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Checks evidence coverage, master-spine routing, currentness, and human-gate rules without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Answer an AGI/DAS site closure question with delivered M130 plus AMBER/WARN MOSB evidence backfill validation.
test_cases.user_prompt: AGI M130 닫아도 돼? BL-535 관련
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a BLOCK verdict with required CONSOLIDATED documents, evidence snippets, validation findings, and a human-gate next action rendered as markdown.

test_cases.description: Explain the Flow Code boundary from ontology evidence.
test_cases.expected_output: Explains that Flow Code is WHP-only and must not be used as route, customs, invoice, or KPI classification, rendered as markdown card.

test_cases.description: Find evidence snippets for a customs delay question.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns document and port-related evidence snippets with document ids, section paths, hashes, and confidence.

test_cases.description: Resolve an operational identifier before answering.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns candidate entities for the BL identifier with scheme, normalized value, confidence, and target id when available.

test_cases.description: Validate whether a draft answer has enough grounding.
test_cases.user_prompt: 이 invoice 과청구야? 답변 전에 근거와 human-gate를 검증해줘
test_cases.expected_output: Returns validation findings for evidence coverage, currentness, and any required human gate before final use.

test_cases.description: Render a previously retrieved answer in markdown format.
test_cases.user_prompt: 이 HVDC 답변을 카드 형태로 보여줘
test_cases.expected_output: Parses the supplied GroundedAnswer (either ChatGPT or Claude format) and returns a structured markdown card with verdict, route, evidence, validation, and actions.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated weather requests.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because weather lookup is outside HVDC ontology workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general coding help unrelated to the app.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request does not need HVDC logistics evidence.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unsupported external message sending.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not send external messages; it should require a separate approved human-gate workflow.
